basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) PhD Scholar (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Hyderabad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Hyderabad PhD Scholar (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in any allied discipline with minimum 60% marks, Under graduate from a CFA with minimum 8 CGPA
qualification.details: Post graduate in any allied discipline with minimum 60% marks. Under graduate from a CFA with minimum 8 CGPA.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Hyderabad PhD Scholar (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Hyderabad PhD Scholar (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad PhD Scholar (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad PhD Scholar (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Hyderabad PhD Scholar (JRF) position is 12th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the PhD Scholar (JRF) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree in any allied discipline with at least 60% marks or an undergraduate degree from a CFA with a minimum CGPA of 8.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the PhD Scholar (JRF) position at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the PhD Scholar (JRF) post at IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of PhD Scholar (JRF) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIT Hyderabad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad is located in Hyderabad, Telangana.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Hyderabad offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age relaxation details. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any such provisions.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode is strictly via email. Offline applications will not be considered.
